name: design-builder
description: Build distinctive production-grade interfaces on web + iOS through 6 user-facing commands (/setup, /design_page, /design_screen, /build, /improve, /review). Spec-first workflow: design specs (markdown) precede code generation. Knowledge-base skill (anti-patterns, motion, HIG, BM25 search) + designlib MCP for authoritative palettes/fonts/inspiration_pages. Evolved from superdesign 1.2.
